money_flow_summary: Money flows from players through in-app purchases (IAP), subscriptions, and game sales to game publishers and platform holders (Apple, Google, Steam take 15-30%). The AI disruption: game content that cost $10M+ to create can now be generated procedurally — enabling solo developers to build and monetize gaming experiences that previously required 50-person studios.

niches.name: AI Game Master & Tabletop RPG Tools

top_opportunities.title: AI Game Master for Tabletop RPG Sessions (D&D / Solo Play)
top_opportunities.niche: AI Game Master & Tabletop RPG Tools
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build an AI-powered Game Master app that runs D&D and tabletop RPG sessions — generates dynamic storylines, voices NPCs, tracks rules, manages dice rolls, and adapts the narrative based on player choices. Target solo players and groups without a human GM. Charge $9.99-$19.99/mo. The tabletop RPG market is $2.5B+ and growing; AI GMs unlock the market for people who can't find human GMs.
top_opportunities.moat: Campaign save state data creates switching cost; community-generated adventure modules expand content library
top_opportunities.first_step: Build basic D&D 5e rules engine + Claude storytelling layer; test with 10 beta players on Discord; launch on itch.io with free tier
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI plays every NPC simultaneously, remembers all prior story decisions, and generates consequences that feel narratively coherent — impossible without LLMs

top_opportunities.title: AI Game Asset Generator for Indie Developers
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build a tool that generates game-ready 2D sprites, tilesets, character animations, sound effects, and UI elements from text prompts. Include game-specific features: sprite sheet export, consistent art style enforcement, Unity/Godot-ready asset packages. Charge indie devs $29-$99/mo. The 500k+ indie developers on itch.io and Game Jams desperately need affordable assets.
top_opportunities.moat: Style consistency system per project creates lock-in; asset library grows with community contributions
top_opportunities.first_step: Build SDXL/Flux fine-tuned pipeline for pixel art and 2D game assets; create Unity integration plugin; post demo on r/gamedev
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI maintains consistent art style across an entire game (all sprites use same palette, proportions, and lighting) — a consistency problem humans solve manually with 100+ hours of iteration

top_opportunities.title: Game Localization Automation Service
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build a pipeline that ingests game string files (.po, .csv, .xml) and game-context information, translates into 12+ languages using context-aware LLM (understanding game terminology, character voices, cultural references), and outputs game-ready localization files. Charge $0.01-$0.05 per word or $299-$999/mo for ongoing updates. Steam games with 12 language localizations earn 3-5x more revenue.
top_opportunities.moat: Game-specific glossary and style guide builds proprietary per-client database
top_opportunities.first_step: Build standard game file format parser (Unity/Godot); use Claude for context-aware translation with game-specific system prompt; offer 1 free game translation on r/gamedev
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI understands game context — translating 'Get rekt' differently than formal text, and maintaining a villain's menacing voice across all dialogue — context-aware quality human translators charge $0.15+/word for
